microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery **validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a standardized, self-service system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and enabled scalable, repeatable data pipeline execution.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new standard for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation** test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict data quality and delivery standards.

Built an internal **AI agent** using LLM-powered workflow automation to restructure drill planning, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% through prompt engineering and process optimization.

Partnered cross-functionally with Engineering, Data, and Operations teams to define requirements, prioritize platform improvements, and drive adoption of **scalable data standards** across the resilience program.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows by conducting user demos and training sessions across 14 key Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating data pipeline productivity.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating findings into actionable requirements.

Improved **data quality and retrieval** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool backed by RAG architecture, cutting lookup time by **83%** across platform teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams and standardizing data delivery workflows.

Drove a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate critical data pipeline paths.

Enabled leadership to prioritize **high-impact automation gaps** by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, surfacing trends that directly informed quarterly roadmap decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping data dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and ensuring pipeline continuity throughout the transition.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across cross-functional Engineering and Operations teams.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving data delivery consistency across the robotics platform.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that standardized data capture and improved pipeline scalability.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and Google profile to improve funnel analytics and lead quality.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that directly informed pricing strategy.
